name: liam-git-workflow
description: Personal Git workflow plugin for Codex. Routes natural-language Git requests into Liam's main/dev workflow with branch, commit, sync, finish, hotfix, release, and policy checks.

interface.shortDescription: Personal Git workflow commands for Codex
interface.longDescription: Use Liam Git Workflow to create branches, draft Chinese Conventional Commits, sync branches, finish work, handle hotfixes, prepare releases, and audit Git policy alignment from one consistent Codex plugin.
